title: Optimizing a Simple API Response
scenario: A developer wants to optimize an API response by removing unnecessary fields and formatting the data in a neat and tidy format. The target output should be a formatted JSON string that meets the requirements. The output should not contain any unnecessary characters.
constraints: Must format the data in a neat and tidy format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the constraints (removing unnecessary fields and proper formatting)
Check if the JSON syntax is valid
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
